title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
